meta.title: Vaman Nayak – Vice President, JW Ventures
meta.description: Portfolio of Vaman Nayak, Vice President at JW, specializing in cold chain logistics, 3PL warehousing, reefer transportation, and GDP/QMS compliant cold storage operations across India.

vcard.title: Vice President – Cold Chain Logistics

addresses.street: 15-45, National Highway 4B, Panvel-JNPT Highway, Village Padeghar

vcard.note: Vice President at JW | Cold Chain Logistics | 3PL | GDP & IMS Compliant Warehousing | Pan-India Reefer Transportation

hero.name: Vaman Nayak — Vice President, JW Ventures
hero.heading: Strengthening India’s supply chain from the ground up — built for reliability, compliance, and scale.
hero.bio: India’s perishables deserve better infrastructure. At JW, we are building exactly that—across 1.5+ million pallet positions and 300+ acres of integrated logistics parks with a strong pan-India presence. Every year, India loses thousands of crores in pharma, food, and allied cargo due to broken cold chains. I lead operations at JW focused on solving this at scale—through GMP/GDP/IMS-compliant cold chain warehousing, integrated 3PL fulfilment, and a robust reefer transport network across key markets. Our infrastructure is engineered to handle the full spectrum of supply chain requirements—from -25°C deep freeze to +25°C controlled environments, along with ambient warehousing and specialized hazmat storage. Every solution is designed with one principle in mind: zero compromise on compliance and zero tolerance for downtime. Our mission To deliver world-class infrastructure, unmatched reliability, and best-in-class cost efficiency—setting new benchmarks for India’s logistics ecosystem.

projects.title: Pan-India Cold Chain Expansion
projects.description: Most cold chain operators only cover metros — leaving Tier-2 markets, regional distributors, and multi-city supply chains underserved. JW runs an integrated network across Mumbai, Bangalore, Delhi/NCR and Chennai covering cold storage (Food, Pharma & Allied), ambient warehousing, customs bonded facilities, and primary & secondary reefer transport under one roof. Next: Tier-2 city penetration and last-mile cold coverage for FMCG and pharma partners who need it most.

projects.title: GDP & IMS Compliant Cold Facility
projects.description: Pharma and food companies routinely fail compliance audits because their logistics partner isn't built to the right standard. JW's cold facility is GDP and IMS certified — with continuous QMS training cycles that keep the team audit-ready year-round, not just at inspection time. If your cargo needs a facility that holds up under regulatory scrutiny and delivers traceability end-to-end, this is the infrastructure your compliance team has been asking for.

paragraphs: India's cold chain is not a solved problem — it's a growing one. Rising pharma exports, organised retail expansion, and FMCG penetration into Tier-2 cities are all creating demand that existing infrastructure simply cannot absorb. At JW, we've spent years building the network, the compliance systems, and the operational muscle to absorb exactly that demand — so when your business needs to scale cold, we scale with you.

Partnering with JW means your cargo moves through facilities that are GDP-certified, IMS-compliant, and staffed by teams who treat every audit as business-as-usual. It means reefer routes that cover metros today and Tier-2 corridors tomorrow. And it means working with an operator who is actively investing in the next decade of Indian logistics — not waiting to react to it. The infrastructure is here. The growth is next.

testimonials.text: "Mr. Vaman is a man of arts in his specific profession. He is great at delegating tasks to his team and ensuring delivery to the required level. When problems become emergencies, he just clicks and they are resolved. His expertise makes him the master of his profession."

testimonials.name: Gowri Sankar G

meta.title: Jignesh Joshi – VP Operations, JW Ventures

vcard.title: VP Operations

addresses.street: 15-45, National Highway 4B, Panvel-JNPT Highway, Village Padeghar

vcard.note: VP Operations at JW Ventures | Cold Chain | 3PL | Multi-subsidiary Logistics Operations

hero.name: Jignesh Joshi — VP Operations, JW Ventures
hero.heading: Logistics operations don't run themselves. Across JW's multi-entity network, I make sure they run right.
hero.bio: India's supply chain complexity multiplies fast when you're running cold storage, freight, and bonded warehousing under one group. At JW Ventures, I oversee operations across subsidiaries — JWR Logistic, JWC Logistics, and JWL Cold Store — ensuring each entity delivers to the same JW standard: compliant, reliable, and ready to scale. If your cargo needs a partner who understands the full logistics stack from JNPT to the last mile, you're in the right place.

projects.title: JW Multi-Subsidiary Operations
projects.description: Running fragmented logistics entities wastes capacity and creates compliance gaps. JW's multi-subsidiary structure — JWR Logistic, JWC Logistics, and JWL Cold Store — operates as a unified platform under one management layer, allowing clients to access cold chain, freight, and warehousing through a single accountable partner. Next: deeper integration of digital tracking and cross-entity capacity sharing.

paragraphs: India's logistics sector is consolidating — and the winners will be operators who can offer compliance, scale, and reliability across entity lines. At JW Ventures, we've built exactly that: a group structure where cold storage, freight, and bonded warehousing share operational DNA, compliance standards, and leadership accountability.

Partnering with JW means one relationship that covers your end-to-end logistics needs. From JNPT port operations to cold-last-mile delivery, from GDP-certified pharma storage to bulk ambient warehousing — we are the single point of contact your supply chain needs. The infrastructure is pan-India. The growth is structured. And the Mark of Trust is earned.

hero.name: Kruti Jobanputra — Director, JW Ventures
hero.heading: Strengthening India's supply chain from the ground up — with infrastructure built for reliability, compliance, and scale.
hero.bio: As Director of JW Ventures, I lead the development of one of India's most comprehensive integrated logistics networks — spanning 1.5+ million pallet positions and 300+ acres of logistics parks with a strong pan-India presence. Through our group companies — JWL Cold Store (Cold Chain, 3PL, 4PL warehousing), JWC Logistics Park (CFS operations), and JWR Logistics (LCL CFS operations) — we handle 40,000+ containers monthly, serving 100+ Fortune 500 clients through C-TPAT, AEO, FDA, and GDP-compliant facilities, operating 24×7×365. Our infrastructure is designed to manage the full spectrum of supply chain needs — from -25°C deep freeze to +25°C controlled environments, ambient warehousing, and specialized hazmat storage. Every solution is engineered with a singular focus: zero compromise on compliance and zero tolerance for downtime. Our mission: Deliver world-class infrastructure, unmatched reliability, and best-in-class cost efficiency — setting new benchmarks for India's logistics ecosystem.

projects.title: Pan-India Cold Chain Expansion
projects.description: JW Ventures operates an integrated cold chain network across Mumbai, Bangalore, Delhi/NCR and Chennai — covering cold storage for Food, Pharma & Allied segments, ambient warehousing, customs bonded facilities, and primary & secondary reefer transport under one roof.

projects.title: GDP & IMS Compliant Cold Facility
projects.description: JW's cold facility is GDP and IMS certified with continuous QMS training cycles, keeping operations audit-ready year-round for pharma and food cargo requiring end-to-end traceability and regulatory compliance.

paragraphs: At JW Ventures, we've built infrastructure that handles the full spectrum of supply chain complexity — from -25°C deep freeze pharma vaults to +25°C controlled environments, ambient warehousing, and specialized hazmat storage. Our group companies — JWL Cold Store, JWC Logistics Park, and JWR Logistics — operate as a unified platform, giving clients a single, accountable partner for cold chain, CFS, and LCL operations across India.

Our mission is to deliver world-class infrastructure, unmatched reliability, and best-in-class cost efficiency — setting new benchmarks for India's logistics ecosystem. 40,000+ containers monthly. 100+ Fortune 500 clients. C-TPAT, AEO, FDA, and GDP-compliant. 24×7×365. Zero compromise.

hero.name: Raaj L. Jobanputra — Director, JW Ventures
hero.heading: Strengthening India's supply chain from the ground up — with infrastructure built for reliability, compliance, and scale.
hero.bio: As Director of JW Ventures, I lead the development of one of India's most comprehensive integrated logistics networks — spanning 1.5+ million pallet positions and 300+ acres of logistics parks with a strong pan-India presence. Through our group companies — JWL Cold Store (Cold Chain, 3PL, 4PL warehousing), JWC Logistics Park (CFS operations), and JWR Logistics (LCL CFS operations) — we handle 40,000+ containers monthly, serving 100+ Fortune 500 clients through C-TPAT, AEO, FDA, and GDP-compliant facilities, operating 24×7×365. Our infrastructure is designed to manage the full spectrum of supply chain needs — from -25°C deep freeze to +25°C controlled environments, ambient warehousing, and specialized hazmat storage. Every solution is engineered with a singular focus: zero compromise on compliance and zero tolerance for downtime. Our mission: Deliver world-class infrastructure, unmatched reliability, and best-in-class cost efficiency — setting new benchmarks for India's logistics ecosystem.

projects.title: India's Largest Integrated Cold Chain Network
projects.description: Most logistics operators offer a piece of the supply chain. JW Ventures delivers the whole thing. Across JWL Cold Store, JWC Logistics Park, and JWR Logistics — we operate 1.5M+ pallet positions, 2.5M+ sq ft of warehousing, and 300+ acres of logistics parks. 40,000+ containers processed monthly. 100+ Fortune 500 companies served. If your supply chain demands scale, compliance, and zero downtime tolerance — this is where it runs.

projects.title: Multi-Cert Compliance Infrastructure
projects.description: Compliance failures cost pharma and food companies audits, recalls, and client relationships. JW Ventures operates the only integrated logistics network in India holding C-TPAT, AEO, FDA, and GDP certifications simultaneously — with facilities spanning -25°C pharma vaults, ambient warehousing, hazmat storage, and container freight, all operating 24×7×365 with zero compromise on standards.

paragraphs: India's supply chain infrastructure has a trust problem — too many operators, too little accountability, and compliance that only shows up when auditors arrive. At JW Ventures, we've built the opposite: a multi-subsidiary network where C-TPAT, AEO, FDA, and GDP certifications aren't badges — they're the baseline. Every facility, every shift, every container we handle is held to the same standard that 100+ Fortune 500 companies have come to rely on.

World-class infrastructure. Unbeatable reliability. Best-in-class economics. That is the mission — and the reason JW Ventures commands 1.5M+ pallet positions, 2.5M+ sq ft of warehousing, and 300+ acres of logistics parks across India today. The next phase is expansion: deeper penetration into Tier-2 corridors, ultra-cold pharma capabilities, and the digital infrastructure to make every movement in our network visible, traceable, and accountable in real time.
